name: Seven-orbit exhaustive-link classification pilot: 12 never-measured leaves
hypothesis: The first six audited never-measured seven-orbit frontier leaves will yield at least one net-new replay-verified closure or a directly validated catalogue-expanding link orbit within the fixed 60-second cap.
expected_signal: Per leaf: reconstructed-CNF audit, bounded solver result, replay receipt for every UNSAT, and direct witness/canonicalization receipt for every SAT; checkpoint reports closure yield, proof bytes, and remaining hard-tail class.
decision_value: A new orbit corrects the classification catalogue; a unique verified UNSAT advances the exhaustive classification; zero signal at the six-leaf gate redirects the remaining hard tail instead of scaling blindly.

efficiency_design.naive_cost: A uniform pass over all 47 canonical leaves would repeat 26 certified closures and spend at least 2,820 solver-seconds before proof replay.
opportunities_considered: Run only the 12 open leaves never measured by sequential search.
Increase timeouts uniformly on the nine measured hard-tail leaves.
Return to kmtotalizer despite zero unique benchmark coverage.
efficiency_design.chosen_reductions: Run exactly the 12 audited, never-measured open leaves in inherited-CNF-size order, in one six-leaf pilot segment followed by one six-leaf segment only after review. Preserve the 26 certified nodes and use only the audited seven-orbit blocker.
efficiency_design.expected_throughput_gain: Avoids 35 duplicate or already-measured attempts; the six-leaf gate exposes closure yield, proof growth, and any new orbit before the second half.
efficiency_design.soundness_basis: The 47-node canonical partition, seven supplied orbits, 2,576-clause blocker, strict blocker monotonicity, 26 certificate receipts, and exact 12-node selection are independently audited. Every UNSAT requires reconstructed-CNF audit plus DRAT replay; every SAT requires direct link validation and canonicalization.
efficiency_design.remains_uncompressed: The 12 selected leaves remain independent obligations, as do nine previously measured open leaves outside this tranche. The seven-orbit catalogue remains non-exhaustive until every frontier node closes or another orbit is found.
